name: Chocolate Layered Dessert
recipeIngredient: 12 Ounce Prepared Marble Pound Cake, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour milk into a large bowl.
2. Add pudding and beat with a wire whisk for 2 minutes.
3. Let stand for 5 minutes.
4. Gently stir in 2 cups of Cool Whip.
5. Arrange half of the cake cubes in a serving dish.
6. Drizzle with half of the chocolate syrup.
7. Repeat steps 4-6 to create layers and finish the dessert by adding remaining ingredients.
